# ============================================================
# Python 3.13 required.
# Install:
#   pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
#   # For reproducible CI builds, use requirements.lock.txt instead
#
# N-1 VERSION POLICY
# -----------------
# All deps are pinned to the previous stable major/minor (N-1).
# See docs/VERSIONING.md for the rationale and bump cadence.
# CI uses requirements.lock.txt (generated by `pip freeze`)
# for byte-for-byte reproducibility.
# ============================================================

# Core web framework
fastapi==0.114.6
uvicorn[standard]==0.30.6
python-multipart==0.0.20

# Config / env
python-dotenv==1.0.1

# Database — psycopg3 (NOT psycopg2-binary, which requires Python <=3.12 C headers)
sqlalchemy==2.0.36
psycopg[binary]==3.2.3

# Validation — pin to 2.10.x; 2.11+ requires pydantic-core 2.33+ wheels
pydantic==2.10.6
pydantic-core==2.27.2

# Auth
python-jose[cryptography]==3.3.0
bcrypt==4.2.1

# HTTP clients
httpx==0.27.2
requests==2.32.3

# Task scheduling
apscheduler==3.10.4

# OpenAI / LLM integration — pin to 1.x; 2.x has breaking API changes
openai==1.82.0
